title: Savory Juicy Russian Beef Kebabs
description: A cultured and festive Russian dish featuring tahini paste and dashi-extract, this recipe is halal-friendly and perfect for any occasion. The combination of flavors and textures creates a truly unique culinary experience.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together tahini paste, dashi-extract, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the beef cubes, onion, and bell pepper onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the beef is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley or dill if desired.
